title: Multi-Token Prediction (MTP)

key_concepts: DeepSeek MTP head architecture (enorm/hnorm/eh_proj + DeepseekV2DecoderLayer + SharedHead)
acceptance rate alpha and expected-tokens-per-forward formula E[tok | a, K] = (1 - a^(K+1)) / (1 - a)
speedup S = E[tok] / (1 + c*K) and break-even analysis
proposer comparison: Eagle / Medusa / DraftModel / Ngram / DeepSeek-MTP
MTP weight name remapping (_rewrite_spec_layer_name) and lm_head sharing
vLLM is inference-only: training-time multi-step CE loss is NOT in vllm/
summary.code_interface: RejectionSampler.forward(metadata, draft_probs, target_logits, ...) -> output_token_ids; DeepSeekMultiTokenPredictorLayer.forward(input_ids, positions, previous_hidden_states, inputs_embeds) -> hidden_states; SpecDecodeMetadata @dataclass; SpecDecodeBaseProposer.propose(target_token_ids, target_hidden_states, next_token_ids, ...) -> draft_token_ids
prerequisites_assumed: Ch08 tensor parallelism (eh_proj and ParallelLMHead may be TP-sharded)
Ch09 expert parallelism (DeepSeek MTP layer's mtp_block is a full DeepseekV2DecoderLayer with MoE)
summary.narrative_tone: 5-step rhythm per major section: open source -> ask why -> derive theory -> implement simplified -> diff vs vLLM. Theory is provably-unbiased rejection sampling; chain-break geometric series; acceptance rate as conditional expectation.
summary.running_example_stage: vocab=8 toy distribution for unbiasedness verification; alpha-K sweep grid (alpha in {0.3..0.9}, K in {1..5}); hidden=2048 toy DeepSeek MTP layer for parameter count comparison vs Medusa heads.

reframes.claim: no class MultiTokenPrediction in vLLM (4th instance after Ch07/Ch08/Ch09)
reframes.evidence: grep -rn 'class MultiTokenPrediction' vllm/ returns only DeepSeekMultiTokenPredictor and DeepSeekMultiTokenPredictorLayer; 30+ per-model *_mtp.py wrappers; 'mtp' is NOT a literal in SpeculativeMethod enum (speculative.py:L59-L70). DeepSeek MTP loads via method='draft_model' + model='deepseek_mtp', or via the eagle3 family.

reframes.claim: outline subsection 3 'Training -- multi-step CE loss weighted strategy' is OUT OF SCOPE for vLLM source (vLLM is inference-only). Reframe to 'inference-time MTP weight loading and weight sharing'.
reframes.evidence: grep -rn 'MTPLoss|multi_step_ce|compute_mtp_loss|mtp_aux_loss|.backward()' vllm/v1/spec_decode/ returns 0 matches. Pivot targets: load_weights at deepseek_mtp.py:L239, _rewrite_spec_layer_name at deepseek_mtp.py:L458, _maybe_share_lm_head at llm_base_proposer.py:L1471.
reframes.pattern: second instance after Ch09 §9.4 aux-loss → EPLB reframe

demos.title: Geometric chain-break: expected tokens vs acceptance rate
Speedup curve under draft cost ratio
core_numerics: c in {0.05,0.1,0.2,0.3} × 7 alpha values = 28 speedup values
demos.trap_evidence: B — at c=0.1,K=4 break-even alpha ~ 0.5; below that MTP is NET LOSS

demos.title: Greedy fast-path vs random-path numerics
core_numerics: ratio (random emits more — recovery never wastes a forward)

demos.title: MTP head architecture parameter count vs Medusa
demos.trap_evidence: E — MTP heads NOT lightweight; full DeepseekV2DecoderLayer

honest_caveats: Synthetic alpha (uniform Bernoulli) is NOT real-workload distribution; production DeepSeek-V3 reports alpha~0.85+ first-step.
Draft cost ratio c is a parameter, not measured on H100; real DeepSeek-V3 c~0.05-0.10; Llama-3.3-1B drafting Llama-3.3-70B c~0.02-0.05.
Single-process demo runs rejection sampling on CPU; real vLLM uses Triton kernels (numerics differ by RNG; algorithm identical).
MTP head architecture demo uses dense FFN, not DeepSeek's MoE block — parameter count is a LOWER BOUND for real DeepSeek-V3 MTP.

language_traps_planned: D: rejection sampling unbiased even at high T
G: alpha is conditional, not model property

knowledge_module.rationale: distinct from Ch07 (K-), Ch06 (P-), Ch08 (T-), Ch09 (E-) per feedback_double_prefix_headings.md

changelog.change: Created Ch10 implementation skeleton; corrected chapter_id from '11-multi-token-prediction' to '10-multi-token-prediction'; added Ch08/Ch09 to dependencies; pinned source commit 98661fe.
